thinking: The user wants me to research two files in parallel using agents, then combine the findings.

tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"description": "Research permissions system", "subagent_type": "Explore", "prompt": "Research how the permission system works in this Rust codebase. Start by reading rust/crates/runtime/src/permissions.rs thoroughly. Then explore how it's used across the codebase — look for imports, usages, and integration points. I need to understand:

1. What types/structs/enums are defined for permissions
2. How permissions are checked/enforced
3. What permission modes exist
4. How tool calls interact with permissions
5. Any approval/denial flow

Be thorough — read the full file and trace key usages. Report your findings in detail."}

tool_uses.name: Agent
tool_uses.input:
{"description": "Research hooks system", "subagent_type": "Explore", "prompt": "Research how the hooks system works in this Rust codebase. Start by reading rust/crates/runtime/src/hooks.rs thoroughly. Then explore how it's used across the codebase — look for imports, usages, and integration points. I need to understand:

1. What types/structs/enums are defined for hooks
2. How hooks are triggered and executed
3. What hook events exist (pre-tool, post-tool, etc.)
4. How hook results affect execution flow
5. Any integration with permissions or tool execution

Be thorough — read the full file and trace key usages. Report your findings in detail."}
